faqs.question: What types of wasps are common in Woodhaven, Queens?
faqs.answer: Woodhaven properties commonly deal with yellow jackets, paper wasps, and hornets. These species often build nests in attics, under eaves, in trees, and around porches. Our team has experience safely removing all wasp species found in Queens.
